title: Say Hi and Thank you to Solomon Yue

replies.msg:
Since LIHKG finally established World channel for foreigners who are interested in Hong Kong internet culture, I think it is a great opportunity for all LIHKG brothers and sisters to express warmest welcome to NCM Yue, who has been supporting Hong Kong protestors since the beginning .

NCM Yue, if you are reading this, please make yourself at home. LIHKG is the most down-to-earth forum in Hong Kong. From here, you will know what Hong Kong teenagers are talking and thinking about. Feel free to browse other channels. If you ask me, I personally recommend 旅遊台 because travel lovers share their quality and in-depth travel experience in there.

Let us know if you need any help, translation (I know you do read Chinese), or information about this place. LIHKG brothers and sisters are more than willing to help .

Thanks again for your help.

光復香港 時代革命
Liberate Hong Kong, revolution of our times
This way please, NCM Yue
Thank you supporting HK.
Show our gratitude
Hi and Thank you!!!
